name: TuGraph
description: High-performance open-source graph database by Ant Group and Tsinghua University; powers Alipay fraud and risk graphs.

seo.title: TuGraph — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: TuGraph: High-performance open-source graph database by Ant Group and Tsinghua University; powers Alipay fraud and risk graphs.

when_to_use: High-performance graph database for fraud and risk detection
Powering Alipay-scale financial graph queries via TuGraph
Knowledge graph storage with millisecond multi-hop traversal
Open-source graph DB by Ant Group and Tsinghua University
Graph analytics for supply chain and social network use cases

pros: High-performance graph DB proven at Alipay scale
Powers fraud and risk graphs in production
Both property graph and analytics workloads
review.verdict: Powerful open-source graph DB with Alipay pedigree, Neo4j still wins on ecosystem and developer experience globally.
review.best_for: Large-scale fraud, risk, and knowledge graph workloads inside China or open-source shops
review.not_for: Teams wanting the biggest graph ecosystem and easiest managed cloud experience
